provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Refugees (Declaration) Order.

Every person described in column 1 of the Schedule hereto who has entered Mainland Tanzania from the place and on or after the date specified opposite to the description in columns 2 and 3 respectively, otherwise than as the holder of or as a person whose name is endorsed upon an entry permit or pass issued under the provisions of the Immigration Act, is hereby declared to be a refugee for the purposes of the Refugees Act 1 . 1 Cap. 54 Schedule (Order 2) Column one Column two Column three Rwandese National Republic of Rwanda 1st January, 1961 Zairean National Republic of Zaire 1st June, 1964 Mozambique National Mozambique 1st September, 1964 Malawi National Republic of Malawi 7th September, 1964 South African National Republic of South Africa 21st March, 1961 Namibian National Namibia 26th August, 1966 Rhodesian National Rhodesia 17th March, 1962 Ugandan National Republic of Uganda 25th January, 1971 Burundi National Republic of Burundi 29th April, 1972 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
